products.name: Tamil Traditional Paruppu Podi (Lentil Powder)
products.description: An authentic South Indian household specialty. Hand-roasted Toor Dal, Bengal Gram, pepper, and dry red chillies stone-milled to sandy-perfection and laced with high-purity garlic-free asafoetida (Hing). Mix with steaming rice and A2 Ghee.
products.traditionalBenefit: Supplies complete high plant protein, improves appetite, and stimulates healthy agni (digestive fire).

products.name: Organic Karuveppilai (Curry Leaves) Rice Podi
products.description: Made from premium, iron-rich fresh curry leaves sourced from regional organic fields. Sun-dried carefully and dry-milled under strict temperature controls with black pepper, urad dal, and dry red chili to preserve its natural therapeutic essence.
products.traditionalBenefit: Rich in dietary iron and Vitamin A. Exceptional for hair growth, liver detoxification, and skin radiance.

products.name: Traditional Idli Milagai Podi (Gunpowder)
products.description: The definitive South Indian accompaniment for soft idlis and crispy dosas. Created with choice dual lentil dry-roasting, black sesame seeds, and hot Guntur chilies crushed coarsely to retain that traditional rustic bite.
products.traditionalBenefit: Boosts blood circulation, warms the throat, and delivers rich dietary fibers.

products.name: Madurai Special Maavadu (Baby Mango) Pickle
products.description: Our crown jewel. Tender baby mangoes hand-harvested during early morning dew, salted in heavy clay jars (Bharani) for several weeks, and cured in cold-pressed sesame oil, mustard dust, and hot red chili powder. A timeless memory.
products.traditionalBenefit: Stimulates digestive saliva, aids sluggish morning digests, and pairs exceptionally with cool curd rice.

products.name: Traditional Citron (Narthangai) Pickle
products.description: Heritage dietary cure. Tender local Citron rind carefully sliced, naturally brined, and sun-matured. Cooked in pure unrefined sesame oil with fenugreek spice layers. No vinegar, zero coloring chemical additions.
products.traditionalBenefit: Extremely popular for soothing pitta-related issues, overcoming morning sickness, and aiding liver bile production.

products.name: Mulaikattiya Sathu Maavu (Sprouted Multi-Grain Mix)
products.description: A traditional whole-family nutrition powder. Over 10 grains and legumes including Finger Millet, Pearl Millet, Sorghum, and Red Rice are sprouted, solar-dehydrated, gently hand-roasted, and stone-milled with aroma-rich dry ginger and green cardamom.
products.traditionalBenefit: High dietary fibers, natural complex carbs, calcium, and minerals. Excellent breakfast substitute for all ages.

products.name: Kovil Puliyodharai Mix (Traditional Tamarind Paste)
products.description: Recreate the rich, divine taste of Srirangam temple tamarind rice at home. Prepared using concentrated, thick ripe tamarind extract slow-boiled in pure wood-pressed sesame oil with roasted black sesame seeds, peanuts, and freshly ground secret temple spices.
products.traditionalBenefit: Balances kapha and vata, stimulates stomach juices, and serves as an ideal travel food with a long shelf life.

products.name: Traditional Sambar Powder (Madurai Grandma Recipe)
products.description: An ancient recipe handed down generations. Sourced from organic farm clusters, dry-roasted under early morning sun rays, and dry-ground in native stone mills to preserve its deep aromatic terpene oils.
products.traditionalBenefit: Supplies natural anti-inflammatory curcumin, improves intestinal gut microbial flora.

products.name: Hygienic Sundakkai Vathal (Salt Cured Turkey Berry)
products.description: Carefully chosen organic Turkey Berries brined in fresh sour buttermilk, salted cleanly, and dried hygienically inside solar houses to protect against street dust and pests. Deep fry in hot oil to make a perfect crunchy rice side.
products.traditionalBenefit: Highly effective in eliminating stomach worms, improves iron counts, and regulates high blood pressure.

products.name: Hygienic Manathakkali Vathal (Black Nightshade Berries)
products.description: Savoury, slightly bitter dried medical berries. Cured carefully in low-fat salted yogurt and sun-dried until dry-crisp. Toss in hot ghee or sesame oil and mix with rice or add to appetizing Vatha Kuzhambu.
products.traditionalBenefit: Highly recognized in Ayurveda for healing mouth & stomach ulcers, cooling body heat, and improving eye health.

items.productName: Hand-Churned Pure Vedic A2 Cow Ghee

expenses.description: Bulk green cardamom pods and native organic Jaggery sweetener blocks
Sun-dried banana leaf packings and woven jute carrier bags

contactMessages.name: Ranganatha Prasad S.
contactMessages.subject: Enquiry for Devasthanam feast prasadams
contactMessages.message: Greetings. We require 500 units of divine ghee laddus and 150 packs of Sakkarai pongal mix for prasadam distribution on the upcoming Sri Rama Navami. Can we schedule secure Ashram van transport directly?

contactMessages.name: Saraswathi Iyer
contactMessages.subject: Custom sour citron pickle jars
contactMessages.message: Tell me if the temple grandmothers currently hold sun-dried citron or bitter gourd slices preserved inside traditional ceramic Bharani jars. Looking forward to booking bulk quantities.
